name: Schema and Router
acceptance: router entries resolve to real folders
docs examples match actual schema
router filename is lowercase index.jsonl

name: Core Skill Migration
deliverable: closeout, track-generate, and chat-to-track migrated into Skills folders with command aliases only
acceptance: migrated skill folders are authoritative
legacy command files are aliases or deprecation wrappers only
all alias targets exist
no duplicated authoritative procedure remains in legacy command files

name: Advisor Migration
deliverable: advisor folders plus non-authoritative legacy aliases
acceptance: advisor children inherit parent defaults
each child has an advisor.json override
legacy advisor command names resolve to real skills
legacy advisor files do not remain authoritative

name: Registry and Guide Alignment
deliverable: registry and guide fully aligned to Skills router
acceptance: WAI-Skills.jsonl parses as JSONL
WAI-Guide.md points to Skills as authority
registry entries include skill_path and entrypoint
WAI-Guide.md does not treat WAI-Spoke/commands as the primary capability surface

name: State and Narrative
deliverable: state files and plan docs updated to reflect full migration
acceptance: no stale claims that legacy commands are authoritative
evolution logs reflect the cutover
next actions match remaining work

name: Verification
acceptance: JSON/JSONL files parse
router entries resolve
alias targets exist
no duplicate authoritative copies for migrated skills
remaining legacy command files are non-authoritative only
